panels.title: fix: eval config now loads .env.local for API keys
panels.scene: A wizard (representing the eval config) is frantically searching through piles of scrolls (API keys). The knight calmly hands him a single, clearly labeled scroll (.env.local).

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: He found the SECRET knowledge! Our automations are SAVED!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It's just a file with some keys in it.

panels.title: fix: hard convo tips stuck on validation in Phase 2
panels.scene: A large gear labeled 'Phase 2' is jammed with sticky goo. Villagers look on in horror. The knight uses a small wrench to dislodge a tiny pebble, and the gear spins freely.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The CONVERSATION flows again! Our feelings are VALIDATED!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It was a minor input validation error.

panels.title: feat: color-coded phase indicator (red/orange/green)
panels.scene: The village elder is staring in awe at a traffic light that wasn't there before (the phase indicator). One villager is painting his house green.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The COLORS! Now we know what PHASE we are in!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It shows the current phase using CSS colors.

panels.title: 11 commits. 7 fixes. 3 features. Color is life.
panels.scene: The knight is leaning against a wall, looking bored. Villagers are bowing before a newly erected statue of a traffic light. One villager is holding a baby named 'Dot-env-local'.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: We shall praise the color gods forever!
